description_long: This is a modern, three-seater couch upholstered in a muted blue fabric, featuring a boxy, geometric silhouette with clean lines. The seat consists of three distinct, thick cushions, while the backrest is composed of three matching, slightly overstuffed cushions that provide a plush appearance. The armrests are straight, wide, and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the sofa's contemporary look. A single, contrasting brown accent pillow is placed on the right side, adding a touch of warmth and visual interest. The base of the couch is supported by a low, dark wooden platform that is only partially visible. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living spaces.
description: A modern blue three-seater couch with straight armrests, plush cushions, and a single brown accent pillow, set on a low dark wooden base.
description_view_0: Front view showing three blue seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and a brown accent pillow on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the couch, the thickness of the cushions, and the brown pillow near the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous blue backrest and the low, dark wooden base, with the brown pillow barely visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armrest, the arrangement of the cushions, and the brown accent pillow positioned at the back.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose seat cushions and three loose back cushions, all in blue fabric, with a single brown accent pillow placed on the right side.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are hidden by a low, dark wooden platform base that runs the length of the couch, with no exposed or decorative legs visible.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, wide, and boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered in blue fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with three loose, overstuffed cushions, matching the seat cushions in color and texture.
